description: YOLOplata project initialized. BJJ technique aggregator with shared open mat queue. Stack: Expo + Firebase, same as TapIn.
DEC-001 to DEC-006 recorded. Stack: Expo+Firebase. Group-first model. Firestore: /groups/{id}/techniques + /groups/{id}/queue. Nav: 5 tabs gated by group membership. MVP scope defined.
YP-014 done. Shared components built: ConfirmModal, Toast, Button, Input, RatingBadge. toastStore with toast helpers. ToastContainer in App.tsx root.

Session paused for restart. Progress: 7/14 tasks done. Done: YP-001 (scaffold), YP-002 (auth screens), YP-003 (auth store), YP-005 (group service), YP-007 (technique service), YP-010 (queue service), YP-014 (shared components). Active: YP-004 (group create/join flow, Apollo). Remaining: YP-006,YP-008,YP-009,YP-011,YP-012 (Apollo screens), YP-013 (Hephaestus Firestore rules). Next action: Apollo builds JoinOrCreateGroupScreen.

summary: Built full technique CRUD with structured media support. Replaced videoUrl:string with media:{type,url}|null. Added parseMediaUrl utility detecting YouTube/Instagram/other. Built CreateTechniqueScreen, TechniqueDetailScreen (YouTube iframe embed on web), LibraryScreen (search + category filter), EditTechniqueScreen. Tasks YP-005 through YP-010 complete.

Added Google Sign-In. Web uses signInWithPopup (works immediately). Native uses expo-auth-session (needs client IDs). ensureUserProfile() creates Firestore user doc on first Google sign-in. Google button added to both LoginScreen and RegisterScreen. Tasks YP-015, YP-016, YP-017 complete.
